programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Left Behind
programme.desc: A haunted prison that once housed America's most notorious criminals, now holds only ghostly secrets. New discoveries at the ruins of a massive industrial operation and at an island's abandoned complex reveal dark and gruesome histories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wonders of the Underworld
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal various deserted, underworld engineering projects: from a terrifying sea fortress to a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice. Experts explain why they were built and why they were eventually abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Rameses: Wrath of God or Man?
programme.desc: A team of international scientists and forensic archaeologists, led by Egyptologist Professor Kent Weeks, unravel the mystery that links the Old Testament, Egypt's Pharaoh Rameses the Great and a skull found in the largest tomb ever unearthed in Egypt.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Belize - Permit Alley
Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: An illegal propane plant explodes in a series of fireballs. Three people and a boat are sucked under a ferry. A dragster disintegrates at 130 mph. An ammunitions dump ignites, and a race boat flips and crashes.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: Ali and Rush each grab a friend and head to the water to relieve cabin fever of the pandemic lockdown.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fire of the Gods
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores places where destruction and creation exist in breathtaking concert, from the legendary Chernobyl nuclear power plant in Ukraine to a Spanish festival that culminates with a citywide inferno.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition
programme.desc: A young man is designing his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go. He and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A special ops vet teams up with a single mom to fight torrential rains, flash floods and sickness in Thailand's Sai Rung River Valley. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before the river leaves them stranded from the crew.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: A bigfoot believer who is afraid of the dark and a tough mom who has never left home take on the dark and mysterious Mayan jungles of Belize.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dad's Being a Dadzilla
programme.desc: Alyssa calls her father 'Dadzilla,' and his opinions rule the day. Wedding planner Michelle feels extra pressure to find the perfect dress. When Emily's custom Pnina gown is all wrong, her dad 'Papazilla' demands a solution.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I've Stalked This Dress on Instagram
programme.desc: Chic designer Hayley Paige is getting married and makes three one-of-a-kind dresses for her big day. Bride Elisabeth comes to Kleinfeld with one goal: to buy her dream Hayley Paige gown. LaKesha, a superfan of designer Lazaro, gets a shock at the salon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Am a Bride on a Budget
programme.desc: Lauren has a $2,000 budget but is in love with a dress that will blow that budget to shreds. Shoshana is a struggling actress, paying for her own dress to complete her special day. Sara is way over budget and has to convince her father it's worth it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bling, Lace and Cleavage!
programme.desc: Krystle loves attention, but her friends may not agree on her over-the-top sexy dress. Maria wants a pure white princess or mermaid gown, but shocks her pastor father with a sexy sheer bodice. Jaclyn faces a major dress dilemma.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Bachelor alum Caila found her real-life prince charming, but to find her fairy-tale gown she must listen to her heart. Ridicule for her love of feathers has Jocelyn heartbroken and her consultant scrambling. Plus, a birthday surprise is in the works.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Wanna Be Naked
programme.desc: Alexis wants to look naked on her wedding day, and Courtney's last-minute indecision puts Randy to the test.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: I'm Not Your Baby
programme.desc: Bini's apartment options shock Ari and her mom. Armando prepares for Kenny's arrival. Jenny is out of patience with Sumit's excuses on his divorce papers. Deavan is done with Jihoon's lies. Brittany's visit with Yazan's parents doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: B90 Strikes Back!: Baby Be Mine
programme.desc: Usman surprises Lisa. Darcey faces the truth. Avery and Ash finally meet. Stephanie puts her health at risk to travel to Australia. David makes plans to go to Ukraine. Geoffrey questions Varya's intentions and Ed worries about Rose's family.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Wanna Be Naked
programme.desc: Alexis wants to look naked on her wedding day, and Courtney's last-minute indecision puts Randy to the test.

programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: I'm Not Your Baby
programme.desc: Bini's apartment options shock Ari and her mom. Armando prepares for Kenny's arrival. Jenny is out of patience with Sumit's excuses on his divorce papers. Deavan is done with Jihoon's lies. Brittany's visit with Yazan's parents doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: B90 Strikes Back!: Baby Be Mine
programme.desc: Usman surprises Lisa. Darcey faces the truth. Avery and Ash finally meet. Stephanie puts her health at risk to travel to Australia. David makes plans to go to Ukraine. Geoffrey questions Varya's intentions and Ed worries about Rose's family.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Come on in, Grandma!
programme.desc: Amanda's biggest challenge is finding a dress both she and her opinionated grandmother love. Hillary searches for a specific gown her late grandmother adored. Macie already found her dream dress, but now Grandma wants to see her in something different.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 'I AM Bride-Yonce'
programme.desc: Bride Lauren loves dressing sexy, but she also wants a gown that will still feel bridal. Ali wants to look like Beyoncé on her big day, so she'll need a sexy gown with tons of sparkle. Blair bought a very sexy dress and hopes her grandmother approves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Won the Battle Against My Twin!
programme.desc: Bride Margo struggles to get her twin sister's approval of the dresses she tries on. Brenda needs all four of her sisters to agree with her dress choice. Amy is trying on her super sexy gown, but worries her twin sister will think it's too revealing.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Rainbow Unicorn Dress
programme.desc: Sharde dreams of a colourful dress to suit her rainbow unicorn wedding, but her mother does not approve. Bride Spencer wants a very avant-garde and dramatic gown for her big day. Sarah is shocked when the scissors come out during her fitting appointment.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Sasha Dress
programme.desc: 'High School Musical' star Corbin Bleu joins his fiancée, Sasha, to find her dream dress. Bride Katie wants a classic ball gown, but her fiancé would like something sexier.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm Not the Size of a Hanger!
programme.desc: Southern bride Danielle gets some help from her girlfriends in the quest to find the perfect glamorous gown. Jen is having a beer-themed wedding, but wants her dress to be more traditional. Katie worries her large assets won't fit in her wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Your Day
programme.desc: War veteran and bride-to-be Alicia has served in both Iraq and Afghanistan. Now, it's Randy's turn to give back to her by surprising this shocked bride with a VIP day at Kleinfeld. The surprises keep getting bigger and better all day long.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm a Legacy
programme.desc: Joelle tries on her mother's 1987 Kleinfeld dress, but is not sure if she is ready to walk down the aisle '80s style. Randy and Antonella know it's going to be a rough appointment when bride LeAnne declares she's the ultimate anti-bride!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You ARE a Daredevil!
programme.desc: Paralympic snowboarder Amy Purdy isn't afraid to take risks, like waiting to find her dress just three weeks before the big day. Katie is the ultimate planner and brings a list ranking her top gowns.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Say Yes to the Dress at Home
programme.desc: The COVID-19 pandemic has turned the bridal industry upside down, forcing Kleinfeld to temporarily shut its doors. During the shutdown, brides continue to email Randy and the Kleinfeld family, and these are some of their stories.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Bachelor alum Caila found her real-life prince charming, but to find her fairy-tale gown she must listen to her heart. Ridicule for her love of feathers has Jocelyn heartbroken and her consultant scrambling. Plus, a birthday surprise is in the works.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Wanna Be Naked
programme.desc: Alexis wants to look naked on her wedding day, and Courtney's last-minute indecision puts Randy to the test.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Tumor Takeover
programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump
programme.desc: Heather has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid. Jesse and Nelda are siblings with matching and painful skin conditions. Margarita has a cluster of unsightly bumps behind her ear, and Paul has a giant hump on his back.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Adventures in Pimplepopping
programme.desc: Inoke has a huge, possibly life-threatening bulge on his shoulder. Delano returns with his back lump after Dr. Lee removed a liter of fluid from it. Reed has hundreds of bumps on his chest that burst and leave nasty scars.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has thousands of tumors all over her body that she feels have ruined her life. Will worries his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. Anthony's daughters force him to get a lump examined. Kal Elle detests her varicose veins.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyler and Taco
programme.desc: Tyler, the Creator and Loiter Squad co-star, Taco, visit the set of Ridiculousness and learn about Sloppy Finishes and Faceballs.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXXXV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Sterling enforce the law with the 'pee pee PD,' golf the hard way in 'play it where it lies' and celebrate the art skills of pint-sized Piacassos.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jordan Clarkson
programme.desc: Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson hangs out with Rob, Steelo and Chanel. They throw down Jammies, observe the Tongue Cam and learn about Gettin' Laked.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Nate Robinson
programme.desc: Professional basketball star Nate Robinson takes a look at some fellow sharpshooters, plays some supermarket sports, and joins in the celebration with the dunk cam.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyga II
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel welcome rap superstar Tyga as they watch some people 'get a taste', witness what could go wrong when you 'make it haute' and find out what kind of talents can make you legendary'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXII
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate Oktoberfest in 'lederhosed', welcome unexpected guests in 'don't answer', and experience some sweet and stern 'southern mother'n'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Post Malone
programme.desc: Rapper Post Malone joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo for some Really White Iversons, to mess things up with Saucin' On You and to present some Knuckle Tats.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: 21 Savage
programme.desc: Rapper 21 Savage introduces Rob, Chanel and Steelo to 'Savage Mode,' updates the dictionary with Word Birthers and provide a teachable moment about how anything potentially Issa Weapon.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan Sheckler
programme.desc: Skateboarding pro Ryan Sheckler joins Rob to look at some heated sibling rivalries and show us how to avoid skateboard missiles.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo hand out 'Cap and Frowns', see what it's like to have 'Futbol Fever' and cool off some 'Lil' Smokies'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Skies
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Lil Skies joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to meet some next level Shelbys, see the effects of sa-bro-tage, and get off the hook.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CIX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get spicy with "mouth arson," feel the pain of slaughter slides, and visit the cutest town ever.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sage the Gemini
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper and producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's 'glide or die,' get 'over gassed' and announce to the world 'I love sparks.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get bent out of shape in ‘hinge cringe’, get trapped in a ‘giggle prison’, and take a visit to the angriest place on earth, ‘swing city’.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: VMA Moments
programme.desc: On a special VMA episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo pay tribute to the great VMA moments with some guitar-tossing Ax Wounds, butt-baring Moon People, and unreal Cardi babies.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Machine Gun Kelly II
programme.desc: Rapper and actor Machine Gun Kelly joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get down and dirty, and compete in the "Drunkathlon."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Anderson .Paak
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel welcome Grammy-winning artist Anderson .Paak to check out some 'social slams', celebrate people with 'signature smiles', and party down at some 'wild weddings'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXIV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo find some people who take "Ghosting" to another level, discuss the best time to just "Take the L" and watch some people get burnt in "Fire Drilled."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Smosh
programme.desc: YouTube stars Smosh expose some 'secret commandos,' showcase the hilarity of getting 'shut up' and help highlight 'why men shouldn't twerk.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn a new game called 'traffic tag,' receive some 'dick tips' and things get messy when they 'pop the man-pagne.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Terrence J
programme.desc: The host of MTV's 'Safeword' and 'Are You The One,' Terrence J, joins Rob, Steelo.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLIV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo dive head first into some dead pools, go into carrot shock and learn a valuable life lesson that everything farts.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jackson Nicoll
programme.desc: Bad Grandpa star Jackson Nicoll stares Rob down in 'made you blink,' sucker punches Sterling with a 'Jackson 5' and reveals why the best bathroom policy is 'lock the door.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Adam Rippon
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo are joined by Olympic figure skater Adam Rippon to swipe right on the animal dating app Whiskr, let it all out in 'Soul Scream,' and keep the streets clean with 'Face Moppers.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Duval
programme.desc: Comedian Lil Duval stops by the studio; Rob warns of the dangers of evil tires and how having a Florida vibe isn't always a good thing.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of 'Drinkovators,' explore the bizarre 'Planet of the Vapes' and test their palates for destruction in the 'Taste of Death.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lyndie Greenwood
programme.desc: 'Sleepy Hollow's' Lyndie Greenwood joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to check out some terrifying 'everyday demons,' and laugh at some hilarious hockey 'puck ups.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling enjoy some 'white whines,' attend an 'animals anonymous' meeting and take a trip to the most dangerous suburb in the country 'slamburbia.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: 100th
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel celebrate the 100th episode of Ridiculousness by getting 'popcorned,' trying not to catch 'heavy leg syndrome,' and having some good old-fashioned 'redneck good times.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo take sexy to the extreme in '50 shades of cray', get zero help in 'service with a shrug' and check out the heartland in 'jolly ranchers'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jeff Tremaine
programme.desc: Producer Jeff Tremaine joins Rob in breaking down what it means to Lawnchair and Slam and Sprint.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Juicy J

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Duff Goldman

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXIX

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ja Rule
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to 'keep it on the green,' run in terror from 'Ja Ghouls' and be driven crazy by 'these damn kids.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXI
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel go 'flame dumb,' test out their hand skills in 'snatch masters' and slow-mo man's best friend in 'goooodddd booooyyyy.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Ridickys

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Show Me the Funny
programme.desc: Find out what part of the male anatomy you definitely don't want stuck in a bike wheel, see the world's largest whoopee cushion and witness an epic unicycle fail.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: You've Got Fail
programme.desc: Find out why a boy regrets his first kiss.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: All Flubbed Up
programme.desc: Watch a woman with seemingly magical powers disrupt an ordinary coffee shop.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Payday
programme.desc: As Eddie prepares to become a dad, the rest of the crew's wagering is out of control, forcing Terry to ban gambling. The crew finds creative ways to bet behind Chief's back, causing Lucy to fall into a hole of debt she can't climb out from.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Fire in Sex Town
programme.desc: When a perverted arsonist strikes Tacoma, the TPD and the TFD must put aside their rivalries to solve the case. To everyone's surprise, the two crews discover they are not as different as they think. Unfortunately, the lovefest may not last.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tells Terry to find the author of an anonymous firefighter blog from the station and shut it down. With everyone a suspect, no one can be trusted.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Lucy Wants a Friend
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Chief McConky to transfer Delilah Dunn to the station, which causes the men in the team to seek a macho match to their energy. Meanwhile, Eddie takes Councilwoman Price for a walk on the wild side.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: When Fire Commissioner Eddie Penisi, Sr. shows up at the station, Eddie and Terry vie for his approval. Meanwhile, the rest of the team plays Dungeons & Dragons to win the acceptance of their dungeon master.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The C-Team
programme.desc: Station 24 is forced to work with the buff and handsome C-Team and their new transfer Delilah. Terry buys a gas-guzzling truck and Eddie takes him for a ride.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: Signature Dishes
programme.desc: In this very special episode of At Home with Amy Sedaris, Amy prepares her famous Ginger Snap recipe to be sanctioned by the Culinary Academy as her very own signature dish.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.desc: After realizing that Bella would be safer with them out of the picture, the Cullen's leave town. Heartbroken, Bella turns to Jacob for comfort and friendship, but quickly learns that Jacob is keeping a secret of his own.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: With her high school graduation coming up, a teenage girl must choose between her vampire boyfriend and her werewolf friend.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: Edward and Bella's unborn child is a risk to the citizens of Forks and to the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: The Volturi are in uproar upon learning of the birth of Edward and Bella's child, Renesmee. In order to protect the innocent child from destruction, the Cullens and the wolves come together in battle.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Twilight
programme.desc: A teen yearning for belonging and understanding moves in with her father in Washington State. She soon falls in love with an enigmatic boy at school, who turns out to be a vampire. They find themselves drawn to each other despite their differences.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After realizing that Bella would be safer with them out of the picture, the Cullen's leave town. Heartbroken, Bella turns to Jacob for comfort and friendship, but quickly learns that Jacob is keeping a secret of his own.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: With her high school graduation coming up, a teenage girl must choose between her vampire boyfriend and her werewolf friend.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Restaurant Teams
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows that there's nothing like the teamwork in a busy restaurant's kitchen, so he invites three teams of phenomenal chefs to represent their restaurants in Flavortown.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Culinary All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy's family loves cooking at home and great restaurant food, so they're combining the best of both worlds by firing up takeout with a twist. On the menu, there's tandoor chicken poutine and polenta flavour bomb, arancini and empandas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' the Italian Countryside
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taking a tasty tour through Tuscany, Italy. In Montecatini Alto, a hillside seafood spot serves up a squid ink specialty and a Mediterranean prawn-artichoke mash up.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grabbin' a Sandwich
programme.desc: Guy heads to Salt Lake City and samples meatball subs and Philly cheese steaks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Picked 'Em
programme.desc: Revisiting favourites from past episodes such as the family restaurant in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fast Food Their Way
programme.desc: In Honolulu, Hawaii, there is a 48-year-old drive-in where burgers and dogs come with rice and macaroni salad. In Nashville, Tenn., a Jamaican cafeteria at the farmer's market serves mango chutney chicken and curried goat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pork and Peru
programme.desc: On this trip Guy digs into killer grub like Michigan-made pizza pie and Philly sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Funky Joints
programme.desc: Guy chases down some funky joints doing serious cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fish, Fries and Feet
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tackling everything from land to sea. In Des Moines, the funky fusion joint serving up unique burritos alongside off-the-chain bulgogi masa fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Taste of Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tracks down international dishes done Triple-D style: A combination Jamaican/Chinese joint in Florida; Home made Polish pierogi at a basic bar in Pittsburgh; and a Mexican restaurant in Utah where the specialty is seven kinds of mole.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Crepes to Kreplach
programme.desc: Guy finds a crepe joint stacking them 21-high in a butter rum caramel cake, and then a deli cooking stuffed cabbage and kreplach.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Totally Unexpected
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers great food in some unexpected places, including a bowling alley, a car wash and Laundromat in Austin and a historic neighbourhood grocery store in Atlanta with fried quail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fillin' Up in Florence
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's hitting up totally traditional Italian spots in Florence, Italy. First, the 50-year-old landmark serving up their legendary spaghetti specialty and some crazy good chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Indulgent Dishes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's indulging himself in righteous, rich recipes. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a crazy seafood spot is reelin' in off-the-hook gumbo and a spicy mahi specialty. Across town, a mother-daughter team is servin' up savoury lamb ragout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Hand and By Fork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into dynamite dishes and grabbin' some outrageous grub.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going big on the pig. In Colorado Springs, a funky food truck serves its pork fusion on loaded platters and Central American arepas. In Minneapolis, an Asian joint tucked away in a grocery store dishes out barbecued pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East-West Flavorfest
programme.desc: Washington D.C. serves dumplings and ramen. Atlantic City has a pizza parlor with cheeseburger and chicken vodka pizza. Also, roast beef and cinnamon rolls in Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked and Barbecued
programme.desc: Things are cookin' all kinds of ways in Flavortown. First, Guy Fieri checks in on a diner in San Diego where law enforcement hones their skills and stuffs their gills.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: The sun is out and the surf is high as Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate DDD spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to say 'Hi' to an old buddy who's reelin' in fresh poke and smokin' pork by the plateful.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Flavortown Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits some of the best of Flavortown, starting in San Diego, where an Asian-inspired noodle house is takin' over the neighborhood. In New Orleans, a neighborhood bistro bounces back from Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Pizza and Pasta 101
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and her daughter, Jade, love nothing more than a day at home making pizza and pasta. Together they make a Chicago-style deep dish cheese pizza plus summery spaghetti with lemon zucchini and lemon strawberry sundaes for dessert.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: The Savory Side Of Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is whipping up a crowd-pleasing brunch of classically sweet dishes reimagined with savory flavors, like stuffed French toast with gruyere, mustard greens and double-smoked bacon, ham and cheese scones.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Fearless Food
programme.desc: Ina Garten is tackling daunting dishes with easy techniques, from a perfectly risen souffle a l'orange to overcoming pastry fears with her totally professional-looking Anna's tomato tart.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: My Kind Of Town: Chicago
programme.desc: One of Valerie Bertinelli's good friends is a recent Chicago transplant, living in Los Angeles but always extolling the virtues of his hometown eats. She invites him and some other Chi-town ex-locals over for a taste of their hometown.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Tasty Treats to Go
programme.desc: Ree cooks up her favorite tasty treats to share with people she loves. She makes pumpkin cinnamon rolls, baklava, and white chocolate shortbread.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chicken in Bulk
programme.desc: Ree's hitting the marked on a major bulk buy trip and stocking up on chicken breasts, ready to turn into a fantastic cobb salad, a pan of skillet chicken lasagna, cool crisp Thai lettuce wraps and feel-good chicken rice soup.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Friendship Fiesta
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's daughter Alex and her best friends are heading to college, and while they have a dorm room craft day, Ree's cooking up a Tex-Mex feast with juicy marinated green chile chicken, spicy taco potatoes, and a layered Mexican salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 9
programme.desc: Ree shares ideas for four family meals with help from her kid film crew. Ree's husband and his father drop by to share speedy mini sloppy joe sliders. Then Ree makes shortcut Hawaiian chicken bowls, meatless sheet pan gnocchi and lemon shrimp alfredo.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Hockey Game!
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, host a hockey party for their sports-loving friends. She makes all her favourites, including crispy fried chicken sandwiches with super-creamy chipotle mayo and homemade noodles.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Dinner and a Movie ... Outdoors
programme.desc: Valerie designs an Old Hollywood menu featuring brisket sliders with white barbecue sauce, horseradish potato salad and crunchy manchego.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Outdoor Dishes
programme.desc: Kardea Brown makes her favourite summertime dishes, including pimento cheese stuffed burgers, rotisserie chicken salad sandwiches, blackberry hand pies, sparkling summer lemonade and, to satisfy her sweet tooth, confetti whoopie pies.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: The Thrill of Pizza on a Grill
programme.desc: Cooking outdoors inspires Italian pizza magic as Michael Symon turns a standard grill into a pizza oven. He uses coals and cast iron pans to cook his homemade dough and produce the perfect crust for his Grilled White Pizza.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Sun's Out, Buns Out
programme.desc: The summer sun and buns are out, burger, sandwich and hot dog buns, that is. Geoffrey shares his tips for a moist and flavourful mushroom turkey burger while Katie makes a meatless grilled halloumi sandwich with watermelon relish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Wicked Aisle Games
programme.desc: A flip of a coin determines whether the chefs can shop the odd or even aisles while making their sandwich and side. In the final round the chefs must make their steakhouse dinner using one ingredient per aisle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Winning Teams
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings back the winning teams of previous competitions for another battle of team supremacy. First, he has them shop without carts for their surf and turf ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pasta La Vista, Baby
programme.desc: Four chefs must make a winning dish in a single aisle showdown. Next, it's all you can carry as the chefs grab ingredients for their barbecue feast with no carts.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Flower/ The Banana

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Video Date
programme.desc: Panda and his brothers engineer an e-date so that Panda is able to show the best side of himself on the video chat.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Pet Shop
programme.desc: A Baby Bear episode, "Pet Shop" tells the tale of where the Baby Bears once lived. After a run-in with a video crew shooting a Sarah McLachlan-type animal adoption video they almost seize an opportunity to find a home separated from each other.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Private Lake
programme.desc: When the local lake is overcrowded with tourists, the Bears have fun at Charlie’s private lake.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Pigeons
programme.desc: Grizz makes friends with a flock of pigeons when he stops to eat leftovers at the park.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: Get Angry, Gohan! Release Your Hidden Power!
programme.desc: Goku and Cell continue to battle but with the fate of the world hanging in the balance, Goku does on the unthinkable and concedes the match.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: Tears for an Android! Gohan's Inner Rage Burst
programme.desc: A father and son battle deadly warriors in order to save the world from disaster.

programme.title: American Dad!: The Vacation Goo
programme.desc: When Francine discovers that all of their family vacations have been artificial memories created by the CIA, she demands a real vacation. Meanwhile, Roger makes a desperate effort to be the greatest actor who ever lived.

programme.title: American Dad!: Meter Made
programme.desc: In order to be taken more seriously, Stan becomes a meter maid who seems to have all the power. Meanwhile, Haley poses nude for a college art class and is surprised to see Roger there.

programme.title: American Dad!: Dope and Faith
programme.desc: When Stan learns that his new friend, Brett, is an atheist, he tries to convince him that God exists. Meanwhile, Roger convinces Steve that he has been accepted to 'Hogwarts.'

programme.title: Rick and Morty: Star Mort Rickturn of the Jerri
programme.desc: Parenting is crazy broh. Stuff straight disappearin in this one.

programme.title: Family Guy: Mind Over Murder
programme.desc: Peter goes to Chris's soccer game and inadvertently punches a woman he thought was a man.

programme.title: Family Guy: A Hero Sits Next Door
programme.desc: When all of Peter's friends, family and co-workers pay attention to his new neighbour, an athletic police officer in a wheel chair, he becomes jealous.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Even the Universes' Gods are Appalled?! The Lose-and-Perish 'Tournament of Power'
programme.desc: It's official, the Tournament of Power is announced. There's just one problem; the losers of the tournament will have their universes erased. Zeno calls for an exhibition match between the 7th and 9th Universe.

programme.title: Paranoia Agent: Radar Man
programme.desc: To deal with the failure to defeat Lil' Slugger, Maniwa goes to a mysterious old man for advice.

programme.title: Mob Psycho 100: The Heinous Aura: Mastermind
programme.desc: Mob and Teru infiltrate the Claw's 7th Division to save Ritsu. Meanwhile Ritsu tries to escape with the other esper kids and they run into the upper echelon and leader of the 7th Division.

programme.title: Black Clover: Return
programme.desc: The Black Bulls finally return to their hideout, but instead of doing the much needed repairs on it they must track down Yami's escaped beasts.

programme.title: Ballmastrz: 9009: Infinite Hugs: Cold Embrace of the Bloodless Progenitors!
programme.desc: When Ace gets depressed because he has no family to share the joy of his new fame in the game with, Gaz and Babyball make him one.

programme.title: Ballmastrz: 9009: Shameful Disease of Yackety Yack! Don't Talk Back! Be Silenced Forever!
programme.desc: When Gaz catches an embarrassing STD, the Leptons must find the cure before a very important public appearance.

programme.title: Naruto: Shippuden: The Underworld Transfer Jutsu
programme.desc: While the team succeeds in defeating the Sound Ninja Four, the enemy uses the Underworld Transfer Jutsu to trap their souls.

programme.title: Samurai Jack: XCIII
programme.desc: Jack’s will to survive is pushed to its absolute limits after a deadly, unseen foe launches a relentless surprise attack.

programme.title: The Shivering Truth: Beast of Both Worlds
programme.desc: Is man punishing itself for some perceived guilt?

programme.title: The Shivering Truth: The Magmafying Past
programme.desc: The only thing hotter than the future is the present, and the only thing wetter than a present is the itchy glass of molten absolution that just quenched the thirst of Tessa's face.

programme.title: The Boondocks: Granddad's Fight
programme.desc: After being beaten in a fight by an elderly blind man, Granddad becomes determined to get a rematch.

programme.title: The Venture Brothers: The Terminus Mandate
programme.desc: The members of Guild Council must face their arch rivals for one last time, while Doc happily falls into a black widow’s deadly web.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Talks You Back to Sleep
programme.desc: In which Joe Pera attempts to talk viewers back to sleep on a rainy night.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Reads You the Church Announcements
programme.desc: Joe Pera reads the announcements at church.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Lights Up the Night With You
programme.desc: In which Joe Pera attempts to present a spirited New Year’s Eve celebration to viewers as well as his neighbor’s five-year-old daughter, whom he is babysitting.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Talks to You About the Rat Wars of Alberta, Canada, 1950 - Present Day
programme.desc: In which Joe Pera and the school’s band teacher, Sarah Conner, put together a musical based on the Alberta Rat Control Program that has kept the Canadian province rat-free since 1950.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Mouth Hole/ Hot Garbage
programme.desc: Robin goes on a mission to learn how to whistle. The Titans learn a valuable lesson about garbage when they try to get Beast Boy to clean his room.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: Here Comes Haavik/ The Fusion Bakugan Arrive
programme.desc: An evil shapeshifting alien has landed in Los Volmos! If that wasn’t bad enough, he has a group of robot mechanoids on his trail trying to bring him justice.

programme.title: Ben 10: Summer Breakers

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Naked Jenga and Afraid
programme.desc: The Shahs are back, and all grown up! Reza and GG decide to bury the hatchet, though GG has yet to make amends with Destiney following their reunion blow-up. Mike boasts that his bad boy ways are behind him after finding the love of his life.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: A Very Shouhed Passover

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: I Want You to Be My Muddy Buddy
programme.desc: As the crew preps for a mud run, Destiney attempts to apologize to Reza, who refuses to budge. GG secretly undergoes the implantation process in her IVF journey. Mike goes head-to-head with his father over a business venture he is looking to pursue solo.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: The Persian Hangover

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Great Persian Bake Off

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Don't Mess With Destiney

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: The Shady Bunch

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: The Making Of
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes, revealing many challenges the filmmakers faced while making of Seven Worlds, One Planet.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Amazon
programme.desc: Steven Backshall investigates what make the Amazon so diverse. He looks at the nutrient poor nature of the rainforest and discusses the strategies used by the life in the jungle to make the most of the little nutrients available.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The polar regions experience the planet's most extreme seasons and are home to some of its most surprising animal behaviours. Polar bears search and fight for mates, penguins surf and orcas hunt collaboratively.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.title: Movie: Dances With Wolves
programme.desc: A Civil War hero is remotely posted and his only friend is a lone wolf. After befriending a local Sioux tribe, he soon earns their respect and comes to embrace their way of life.

programme.title: Movie: Inception
programme.desc: A skilled thief has a final shot at redemption if he can execute his toughest job to date. To be reunited with his family, the man must plant an idea into his victim's subconscious.

programme.title: Movie: Apollo 13
programme.desc: The true story of how the crew of the ill-fated Apollo 13 moon mission averted tragedy with skill and determination.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: Alaska’s Panhandle
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Alaska to learn about survival and Alaskan cuisine.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: Louisiana's Bayou Cuisine
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay travels deep into the Louisiana marsh to learn the secrets of Cajun cooking.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: The Wilds of South Africa
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay returns to the basics to discover Zulu cuisine in KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: Sumatra's Stunning Highlands
programme.desc: In the West Sumatra highlands, Chef Ramsay unlocks the secrets of Padang-style cooking.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: Hawaii’s Hana Coast
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the Island of Maui to discover the secrets of Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: India's Spice Hub
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay discovers the culinary secrets of southern India, the birthplace of spices.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted: Guyana's Wild Jungles
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay journeys into the jungle of Guyana in search of the roots of Guyanese cuisine.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Flowers in the Lake
programme.desc: Leesa Nascimento was murdered on July 6, 2010 by being shot in the head. A recently sacked co-worker, Lorenza Sam is traced after evidence was found that tied him to the murder and he was arrested. He was sentenced to Life in Prison without parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder
programme.desc: Theresa Wesolowski was murdered on May 29, 1999, leaving police baffled for nearly 10 years. They finally got a break in the case when a new DNA technique identified a co-worker, Mark Libecki, who was convicted of 1st degree murder in 2009.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss. After 12 years of searching, they finally uncover the fiendish plot to exploit the helpless victim.

programme.title: The Genetic Detective: The Case of the Missing Lovebirds
programme.desc: CeCe Moore investigates the case of a young couple who disappeared in 1987 after taking a ferry from Vancouver to Seattle, and were later found miles apart, gagged, bound and brutally murdered.

programme.title: Minnesota Murder
programme.desc: A marriage on the brink is tested on the dark waters of Lake Minnetonka.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Daughter's Fight
programme.desc: A woman is murdered, and her daughter is certain she knows who is responsible. But can she prove it? After five years a cold case turns hot, and investigators discover the suspect a pillar of the community is hiding secrets.

programme.title: The Genetic Detective: The Case of the Missing Lovebirds
programme.desc: CeCe Moore investigates the case of a young couple who disappeared in 1987 after taking a ferry from Vancouver to Seattle, and were later found miles apart, gagged, bound and brutally murdered.

programme.title: Minnesota Murder
programme.desc: A marriage on the brink is tested on the dark waters of Lake Minnetonka.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Rehab Mogul
programme.desc: He was the owner of more than 20 drug treatment facilities in two states. But some former clients claim the man dubbed 'Rehab Mogul,' Chris Bathum, was a drug user and sexual predator. They say he didn't help their recovery, he derailed it.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: To the Death
programme.desc: When two young men are found shot in an apartment hallway, Kenda must rely on his inner lie detector to figure out which victim was no victim at all. Then, police investigate a murder in broad daylight and nearly get killed themselves.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Shanann Watts and her two daughters went missing. Her husband Chris was on television, pleading for their return. Then their bodies were found at the oil site where he worked.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Slenderman
programme.desc: New details emerged in the trial of the two girls who stabbed their best friend 19 times and left her for dead in the Wisconsin woods.

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: Selena
programme.desc: Explores the story beyond the movie, a shocking, heartbreaking crime that extinguished a bright star's life and career.

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: Monster
programme.desc: A look at the life of Aileen Wuornos, America's first female serial killer and the woman Hollywood dubbed 'Monster.' In a never before seen interview, Aileen reveals intimate details of the love affair that led her to killer seven men.

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: To Die for
programme.desc: Explores the case of the high school teacher whose teenage student and lover killed her husband.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: Mike Dixiano is heartbroken when his wife Angela Dixiano dies from organ failure after a lifelong battle with drugs and alcohol. Friends and family grieve her death, but when investigators can't find a death certificate, her husband comes under scrutiny.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Man with Two Faces
programme.desc: Bloomington, Illinois Sergeant Jeff Pelo is a respected police officer. At home, he's a model father and husband. So when he's caught trespassing after midnight on a young woman's property, his spotless reputation comes under fire.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Yes, Master.
programme.desc: When an aspiring kindergarten teacher in Dublin, Ireland goes missing, her family assumes depression over her mother's death drove her to suicide. They never suspected the real reason – involving a twisted BDSM master gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Sick and Twisted
programme.desc: Dana MacKay is found viciously beaten to death while her husband is out of town. One suspect comes to mind: a woman who's been stalking Dana for the last month. But it will take a cellphone with X-rated text messages to unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crowded House
programme.desc: Lonely teen Jessica Sacco turns to the internet to find other so-called 'Juggalos' who share her interests in edgy music. There, she makes new friends and even finds a boyfriend. She moves in with them, and soon finds herself unable to escape their grip.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Too Fast, Too Young
programme.desc: After a troubled childhood, 13-year old Christina Long's life seems to be on the up and up. Now living with her beloved Aunt Shelly, Christina is a popular honor student and cheerleader. But when her online life is revealed, it tells a more tragic story.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Stolen Youth
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl seeks solace online following her parents bitter divorce, when she meets a local girl who wants to help. After an apparent runaway, Hope's family receives a call that proves Hope didn't leave by choice.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: 18th Street
programme.desc: Lou joins 18th Street gangsters, in prison and on the street, to learn why their deadly rivalry with the MS-13 is devastating El Salvador.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: John Gotti: The Teflon Don
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Sam Giancana: Mafia vs. CIA
programme.desc: We reveal the secrets of the Mafia's most notorious members, beginning with Sam Giancana, who was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra, and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: John Gotti: The Teflon Don
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Sam Giancana: Mafia vs. CIA
programme.desc: We reveal the secrets of the Mafia's most notorious members, beginning with Sam Giancana, who was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra, and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: 18th Street
programme.desc: Lou joins 18th Street gangsters, in prison and on the street, to learn why their deadly rivalry with the MS-13 is devastating El Salvador.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs but when his brother David realized who was the Unabomber, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin For the Whole Family
programme.desc: Chase and the team come in to rebuild and ultimately repair this cabin for Laurence and his family.

programme.title: West End Salvage: Breaking a Door Hoarding Habit
programme.desc: Don has piles of doors stashed away on the fourth floor and Hal is determined to thin the collection out. When they are hired to build a headboard, Hal suggests using several of the doors they have upstairs to create a gigantic showpiece.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Pool Kings: I'm on Vacation Already
programme.desc: Now that the interior of their dream house is finished, a family of five asks the Pool Kings to transform their neglected backyard. They want a relaxing multi-level private resort with a waterfall grotto, huge spa, swim-up bar and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Canyon Country Playground
programme.desc: A big family on a large property wants to replace their old patio and pool with an updated design. Mike and Jim deliver on the dream by transforming the yard into a canyon country playground. The backyard oasis includes a lazy river and a cave.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean and Classic in Corona
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Corona, California, to help a big extended family that's running low on living space. They design a clean, geometrical pool with an artistic fountain wall, fire features and a killer barbecue area for everyone to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Twice as Nice
programme.desc: A Kentucky couple seeks out the kings to help them revamp their worn-out lakeside swimming pool. The guys accept the challenge and turn the eyesore into a backyard paradise complete with a custom slide, secondary pool and more.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Bar: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this cocktail show from 2006 with a new martini, a new mint julep and perfectly clear ice cubes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fungal Gourmet: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2000 with new recipes for mushroom stroganoff and pickled mushrooms. Oh, and there's a visit from a certain insect who just so happens to be made of some of the same materials as mushrooms.

programme.desc: Paul Miranda enters the stadium to challenge Iron Chef Cat Cora to a culinary showdown.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Desserts such as donuts that raid the savory spice cabinet, roasted pepper gelato.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Small Bites
programme.desc: Stacked baklava and creative candies from Queens and Brooklyn, tiny treats.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Chocolate
programme.desc: If a love for chocolate can be described as a religion, we have found the ultimate places of worship that claim devotion to little else. Atop the shrine to this beloved ingredient sits a collection of playful chocolate confections.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweets All Day Long
programme.desc: Check out three unique places that satisfy any sweet tooth from sunrise to sundown. At the Wandering Goose in Seattle, they push the sweet boundaries with Southern goodies like chocolate chip cookies with toffee and crispy chicken skin.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Luscious Layers
programme.desc: Three unique sweet spots that deliver layers of incredible flavors and textures. Union Fare Bakery in New York City is flipping the switch on the classic croissant and baking up flavors like red velvet and birthday cake.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Seattle Sweets
programme.desc: At Rodeo Donut, small-batch brioche doughnuts wake your taste buds up with the perfect mix of spicy and sweet. At Amandine Bakeshop, you get a taste of France.

programme.title: Cake Wars: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons, are throwing a huge bash to celebrate their success and one of our cake makers will have their winning creation front and center at the event.

programme.title: Cake Wars: DC Comics
programme.desc: Batman, Aquaman, Superman, Wonder Woman and many more are coming to Cake Wars as DC Comics is looking for the best cake maker to create a centerpiece for their celebration. It'll be two harrowing rounds to see who will win the $10,000.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Twin Cities
programme.desc: Walleye, bundt cake, and the Jucy Lucy are on tap for Andrew in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Barcelona
programme.desc: Andrew takes us to Barcelona, a coastal city that draws its edible inspiration directly from the mountains and sea. From tapas to crema Catalana, the foods of this Mediterranean city reflect history and culture in every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Munich
programme.desc: As the proud capital of Bavaria and beer-drinking, Munich has built a cuisine around hearty dishes meant to stick to the bones. From schnitzel and spätzle to knöedel and cake, Andrew Zimmern reveals Munich's festival of foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Zurich
programme.desc: Andrew takes us to Zurich, the origin of some of Switzerland's most famous foods. From warm gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate made with a modern twist, this city is home to some of the most indulgent comfort foods in the world.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hong Kong
programme.desc: The city of Hong Kong's seven million residents flock to its many restaurants, street carts, and noodle houses daily. From dim sum to congee to roast goose, Andrew Zimmern finds out just what makes this destination so delicious!

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.
