programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Five: 1980-1989
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Six: 1990-1999
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change with expansion and the sport's first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and quarterback Peyton Manning.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Seven: 2000-2009
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Eight: 2010-2019
programme.desc: The SEC has a run of seven straight national titles, and nine in 12 years. Expansion in 2012 gives the conference 14 schools. Meanwhile, Nick Saban arguably becomes the greatest coach in the history of college football.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Walk-Off
programme.desc: Warren Morris hit the most famous home run in college baseball history; a two-run walk off shot which won the national championship.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Sweat Solution
programme.desc: The film explores the inception of Gatorade set against the 1965 and 1966 seasons of the Florida Gators football team. Originally produced for the 50th anniversary, the film revisits the stories of those involved in testing the original formula.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Stacy's Gift
programme.desc: Stacy Lewis's journey to becoming a professional golfer included dealing with scoliosis, a serious surgery, an NCAA championship and a devastating hurricane.

programme.title: SEC Storied: No Kin to Me
programme.desc: The people, teams, moments and events that tell the ongoing story of the SEC.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Coach Bernie
programme.desc: The story of Bernadette Locke, the second female assistant coach of Division I men's basketball in NCAA history. Rick Pitino and Bernadette's fellow assistant coaches attest the Bernadette made all the difference.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Bo You Don't Know
programme.desc: Robert 'Bo' Rein was a baseball and football star at Ohio State before beginning a football coaching career at just 30 years old. in 1979 he was hired to coach the LSU Tigers before tragedy struck and left everyone thinking about what might have been.

programme.title: SEC Storied: By Grantland Rice
programme.desc: There is no more hallowed figure in sports journalism than Grantland Rice, who maintained a ruling perch across the sports world for more than 50 years. This film relives sport's golden era through the eyes of a reporter who had a front row seat.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Rowdy
programme.desc: Look at the life and comeback of Rowdy Gaines from the boycott of the 1980 Olympic Games to his battle with Guillain-Barre Syndrome.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Abby Head On
programme.desc: A look at soccer player Abby Wombach's perseverance to excel in her sport and become one of the best athletes the United States has ever produced.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Mighty Ruthie
programme.desc: Auburn Tiger and Olympic gold medalist Ruthie Bolton is a victim of domestic violence and uses her platform to become an advocate for women's empowerment.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Norm
programme.desc: Chronicling the life of Missouri men's basketball coaching legend Norm Stewart, centering on Stewart's life as an athlete, a husband, a coach and a cancer survivor.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Dominique Belongs to Us
programme.desc: Dominique Wilkins was the toast of his hometown in Washington, N.C. After choosing the University of Georgia over local ACC schools, his fans' cheers turned to jeers. The betrayal left him distrustful of fans until fan support paved his way home.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Rebel
programme.desc: The story of Johnny Neumann, a prodigy who let his ego get in the way of his success.

programme.title: SEC Storied: 40 Minutes of Hell
programme.desc: Look at the rise, fall and redemption of University of Arkansas coach Nolan Richardson.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Repeat After Us
programme.desc: Florida's big five return for the 2007 season to become the first school to repeat as basketball national champions with the same starting lineup.

programme.title: NASCAR Race Classic: The 1997 Daytona 500
programme.desc: The classic 1997 Daytona 500 is cut down and hosted by Dale Jr. and features fun facts and trivia about the race and pop culture in 1997.

programme.title: Refuse to Lose: Jeff Gordon and the 1997 Daytona 500
programme.desc: Using never-before-seen all-access footage, this documentary presents a revealing and personal look at Jeff Gordon, Ray Evernham, and the No. 24 team in the twelve days leading up to their victory in the 1997 Daytona 500.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Cakes

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Choreographed

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Remember Me
programme.desc: A young woman takes a man hostage at gunpoint and Benson makes a dangerous move to diffuse the situation. The SVU discovers the shocking motive behind the abduction.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Remember Me Too
programme.desc: Benson's suspicions about a kidnapping victim uncover a dangerous criminal network prepared to silence anyone who gets in their way.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Man Up

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Man Down

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Caretaker
programme.desc: The cops wrestle with an unthinkable crime when a family is murdered in their sleep.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thanksgiving Jamboree

programme.title: Modern Family: The Alliance
programme.desc: Hayley's plan for a fun-filled girl's day with Rainer Shine's teen daughter may be a little more angst-filled than expected. Meanwhile, Luke finds himself in a compromising position with a widow at the club.

programme.title: Modern Family: Snow Ball
programme.desc: When Manny and Luke put on the school's lavish winter dance and end up over their heads due to a texting error, it is up to them to fix it before the end of the night.

programme.title: Modern Family: Ringmaster Keifth

programme.title: Modern Family: Sarge and Pea
programme.desc: Cam is incensed that an anonymous and rude parent robbed him of a precious Lily moment during her recent dance recital. Meanwhile, Jay, Claire and Mitch attend a family wedding and unexpectedly run into Dede at the reception.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do It Yourself

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Manipulated
programme.desc: When a stripper is found murdered in her apartment, the detectives learn she was also a successful attorney who kept her two lives separate. However, when a fellow stripper is found dead, the investigation uncovers a connection to the lawyer's boss.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fault
programme.desc: Solid investigative work in a kidnapping case leads detectives to violent repeat sex offender Jeremy Paul Wilson, who was recently released back onto the streets.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Recall
programme.desc: A collection of evidence leads detectives to a surprising suspect, Martin Trenway, who is a distinguished lawyer. Charges are made against him, but later dismissed due to insufficient evidence. A meeting with an older French woman breaks the case open.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Uncle
programme.desc: When the prime suspect in a brutal rape and murder turns out to be Det. Munch's uncle, the case turns into something that none of the detectives had imagined.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: The CSIs are on the case when a member of a motorcycle gang is murdered at a local biker bar.

programme.desc: June lives in a mobile home filled with keepsakes like Care Bears and Cabbage Patch dolls. Doug is a single dad of two kids, both with special needs and the condition of the home only adds to the issues.

programme.title: Hoarders: Linda
programme.desc: Linda hadn't allowed her family into her home for years. A recent medical emergency exposed the secret she'd been hiding. What her daughter found in her home shocked her and made her question her mother's sanity.

programme.title: Hoarders: Andy and Becky
programme.desc: Andy and Becky feel it is their constitutional right to live however they choose, even if that's among 250 tons of hoard. Now they're in a battle with the city government that could end in them going to jail and losing their home.

programme.title: Hoarders: Patricia
programme.desc: Since retiring as a nurse, Patricia makes extra money selling things that other people have discarded. Now she’s getting fined thousands of dollars a week because her three Florida homes are overflowing with her inventory.

programme.title: Hoarders: Three Amigos
programme.desc: Donald and his brothers Peter and Raymond are close friends who do everything together, including hoarding. Due to their hoarding, each of them now faces his own personal crisis.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 8
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Fighting Back the Tears
programme.desc: Gym-loving ladies power through the pain while bartending besties try to knock back the heat. The fight for $25,000 is not easy. Friendships will strain, people will cry, and stomachs will be destroyed in the pepperdome.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.desc: House is in a bus accident and loses four hours of his memory. He slowly pieces together that a fellow passenger was exhibiting signs of a deathly illness, and he must figure out whom in order to save the person who might not even know he or she is dying.

programme.title: House: Wilson's Heart

programme.title: House: Don't Ever Change

programme.title: House: No More Mr. Nice Guy

programme.title: Lone Star Law: When Deer Attack
programme.desc: Game Wardens patrol the Rio Grande in search of an unidentified body.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stray Bullets
programme.desc: In El Paso County, teal season has just begun. An injured hog needs help in Hardin County. Galveston County fishermen are not playing by the rules. A suspicious driver is searched in Chambers County. Turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stag Poaching
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Gould responds to the call about an exotic red stag that was shot. In Hunt County, a plethora of warrants are dispersed for unpaid fishing violations, while Warden Flores and Williams join forces on the last day on patrol.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks and Bows
programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back in the Wild
programme.desc: Anglers are out all over Texas. In Houston County, a Game Warden returns after a life-threatening injury. Along the coast, fishermen get caught with too many sharks. A protected turtle gets relocated and anglers on the Gulf learn how to tag fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stag Poaching
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Gould responds to the call about an exotic red stag that was shot. In Hunt County, a plethora of warrants are dispersed for unpaid fishing violations, while Warden Flores and Williams join forces on the last day on patrol.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Nick of Time
programme.desc: Texas Summer has Game Wardens Chelsea and Ben rushing to a call about a capsized canoe. Game Warden Deschaaf investigates a trapped deer that leads to more questions than answers. At Canyon Lake, Game Wardens assist in the arrest of a man with a warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Submerged
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens are all hands on deck after a massive flash flood. Game Wardens rush to a gas station that could explode. A patrol through the Rio Grande leads to an unexpected encounter. Game Wardens investigate an illegally killed hawk.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: When Deer Attack
programme.desc: Game Wardens patrol the Rio Grande in search of an unidentified body.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dirty Habits
programme.desc: Parker investigates a rotting bear carcass that was dumped on the side of the road, leading him on a hunt across Maine to find a potential poacher. Blanchard catches a couple behaving badly on a wildlife refuge. Robertson rescues some ducklings.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Catcher in the Wild
programme.desc: A speeding dirt biker eludes Warden Robertson, but leaves a crucial clue to his whereabouts. Two dogs on the loose are chasing newborn deer. An ATV accident victim has an odd explanation for what caused his crash.

programme.title: North Woods Law: And the Little Ones Too
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead beaver in a Skowhegan parking lot leads Warden Parker on an exhaustive investigation involving surveillance cameras, anonymous informants and the assistance of the local police.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Only the Strong
programme.desc: The countdown to winter continues as Heimo breaks ground on the new cabin. Bob and his daughter embark on a river journey to the cabin where she was raised.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Final Preparations
programme.desc: Preparations for winter continue, and focus centers on finding food. Heimo pursues caribou meat, while Tyler and Ashley score big game, building their confidence in the bush. Bob and his daughter reminisce on the past as they arrive at their cabin home.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Alone
programme.desc: Fall continues in the bush as the Last Alaskans settle into wilderness solitude. Battling loneliness, Bob Harte welcomes a visitor to his cabin. The Seldens bask in the glory of a major triumph, while Ray Lewis is just beginning the hunt for meat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Edge
programme.desc: The race begins to secure food and shelter before the snow flies. Heimo's family hunts for caribou, but a bear could stop them in their tracks. Tyler and Ashley work to pull in a winter's supply of salmon. Bob and Nancy face a hard truth about his future.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: The Seldens embark on a four-day trapping loop that could lead them through dangerous conditions. Heimo must compete with a pack of wolves to secure a moose for winter. The Lewis cabin is rehabbed, but the girls still have a lot to learn.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Dark Winter
programme.desc: It's the dead of winter and the Last Alaskans move through the icy Arctic. Heimo still needs a moose, while the Seldens embark on the next part of their trapline journey. One of the last of the Last Alaskans, 19-year-old Charlie Jagow, is introduced.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: The sun returns, signalling late winter in ANWR. An unwelcome intruder threatens Tyler and Ashley's success. Heimo and Edna say a final goodbye to their oldest cabin, while Charlie meticulously builds his very first and reflects on his future in the bush.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Pray for Snow
programme.desc: Winter in the Arctic Refuge usually means go time for The Last Alaskans but this year low snowfall is slowing them down - snow machines and dogsleds are useless in these trail conditions.

programme.desc: The team discovers that one of their own is compromised when they investigate the murder of a navy contractor involved in illegal transactions of confidential data. Meanwhile, Hetty is under investigation in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Panty Sniffer
programme.desc: Catherine and Detective Vartann are thrown together in a hotel room for 24 hours as they stake out a duo making drugs next door. Meanwhile, Nick and Langston work a case that involves a fetish which has become big business in Las Vegas.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Praesidium
programme.desc: The team takes action to protect one of their own while being interrogated by the Department of Justice. Meanwhile, Nell goes undercover as Hetty, and Director Leon Vance gives Hetty disturbing news while she is in Washington.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The 3rd Choir
programme.desc: When the team learns that someone from their past is targeting one of their own, they desperately search the city. Meanwhile, Operational Psychologist Nate Getz visits Nell to help her through her traumatic experience.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Black Budget
programme.desc: Callen and Sam head to Mexico to track down the only employee who managed to escape a professional shooting at the Department of Defense. Meanwhile, the rest of the team works to uncover the motive behind the shooting.

programme.title: NCIS: Seek
programme.desc: The wife of a marine who specialized in K-9 bomb detection urges the NCIS team to investigate the recent death of her husband in Afghanistan. Meanwhile, Vance asks for the team's assistance as he interviews nannies.

programme.title: NCIS: Squall
programme.desc: A massive storm brings the NCIS team aboard the USS Borealis, where everyone becomes a suspect once the crime scene proves that Mother Nature wasn't the only culprit. McGee discovers that his estranged father was aboard at the time.

programme.title: NCIS: Chasing Ghosts
programme.desc: When a Navy reservist returns home to find her husband missing and her living room covered in blood, she turns to NCIS for help. Meanwhile, Tony suspects that Ziva is planning a risky move to avenge her father's death.

programme.title: NCIS: Berlin
programme.desc: While the NCIS team investigates the murder of a Mossad officer in Virginia, Tony and Ziva depart for Berlin as they track her father's killer.

programme.title: NCIS: Revenge
programme.desc: In retaliation for the murders of Eli David and Jackie Vance, the NCIS team feverishly searches for Bodnar despite orders from Homeland Security to relinquish the case.

programme.title: NCIS: Double Blind
programme.desc: A Department of Defense investigator scrutinizes the NCIS team’s response to the Bodnar case involving the murder of Ziva’s father and Vance’s wife.

programme.title: Family Guy: Trump Guy
programme.desc: The Griffins move to Washington D.C. where Peter is hired as the new White House Press Secretary.

programme.title: Family Guy: HTTPete
programme.desc: To help promote the brewery to millennials, Peter adopts the millennial lifestyle, and his methods soon attract the attention of a high-powered Silicon Valley executive.

programme.title: Family Guy: Three Directors
programme.desc: In a special anthology-style episode, Peter gets fired from his job at the brewery in the signature styles of three famous Hollywood film directors.

programme.title: Family Guy: Hefty Shades of Gray
programme.desc: After Peter's hair turns white from a ghost-hunting adventure in his house with the guys, his new look grabs the attention of local news anchor Tom Tucker. Under Tucker's guidance, he learns the ways of reporting fake news.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pawtucket Pete
programme.desc: The Pawtucket Brewery hires new bosses, who decide to change the company's mascot. In an attempt to be crowned the new face of Pawtucket Ale, Peter and Brian go head-to-head.

programme.title: Family Guy: Don't Be a Dickens at Christmas
programme.desc: A selfish Peter loses his Christmas spirit and is visited by ghosts of Christmas past, present and future who take him on a journey around Quahog in the style of Charles Dickens' 'A Christmas Carol.'

programme.title: Family Guy: Are You There God? It's Me, Peter
programme.desc: After Peter falls into a coma, Peter meets God face-to-face, which leads him to ask some of life's tough questions.

programme.title: Family Guy: Foxx in the Men House

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brother's Little Helper
programme.desc: Bart is diagnosed with attention-deficit disorder and placed on an experimental drug.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Guess Who's Coming to Criticize Dinner?
programme.desc: Homer asks Lisa for help when he becomes the food critic for The Springfield Shopper.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Nightmare on Ocean Avenue Street
programme.desc: The kids set out for their regular Halloween shenanigans, but when everyone's candy bags start mysteriously disappearing, it's up to Tina, Louise and Gene to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Teddy decorates the restaurant to compete with another handyman.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Bed, Bob and Beyond
programme.desc: A Valentine's Day fight between Bob and Linda has the kids feeling confused. After a failed attempt to see a movie, it’s up to Tina, Louise and Gene to tell their own story as a distraction from the awkward tension.

programme.title: Movie: The Shallows
programme.desc: When Nancy is surfing around a secluded beach, she finds herself inside the feeding grounds of a great white shark. In the attack, she loses her board and becomes stranded 200 miles from shore. Getting to safety is the ultimate contest of wills.

programme.title: Archer: Drastic Voyage: Part Two
programme.desc: The fantastic voyage concludes.

programme.title: Archer: The Figgis Agency
programme.desc: Archer breaks into a mansion to restore the honour of a Hollywood starlet.

programme.title: Mom: Thigh Gap and a Rack of Lamb

programme.title: Mom: Mozzarella Sticks and a Gay Piano Bar

programme.title: Mom: Sawdust and Brisket

programme.title: Mom: A Pirate, Three Frogs and a Prince

programme.title: Black-ish: Any Given Saturday

programme.title: Black-ish: The Leftovers
programme.desc: When Dre and Bow realize they don't have a legal guardian for their kids, they make it their mission to find replacement parents should anything happen to them. Meanwhile, Zoey and Junior reveal the truth to Jack about their old dog's death.

programme.title: Movie: The Homesman

programme.title: Movie: Assassin's Creed

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: A gunslinger locked in eternal battle with a sorcerer over the fate of all worlds has his mission interrupted when he meets a boy from Earth. Their conflict spills onto the streets of New York City where the two men clash in a battle of good versus evil.

programme.title: Movie: Apollo 13
programme.desc: The true story of how the crew of the ill-fated Apollo 13 moon mission averted tragedy with skill and determination.

programme.title: Movie: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A cover-up is revealed after two young marines are accused of murdering a member of their platoon on a U.S. Naval base.

programme.title: NOS4A2: Bruce Wayne McQueen
programme.desc: Vic McQueen returns to the Lakehouse only to ride straight into a deadly trap. Charlie Manx cashes in his favor. We meet the Hourglass Man, a powerful strong creative.

programme.title: Movie: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A cover-up is revealed after two young marines are accused of murdering a member of their platoon on a U.S. Naval base.

programme.title: Movie: Apollo 13
programme.desc: The true story of how the crew of the ill-fated Apollo 13 moon mission averted tragedy with skill and determination.

programme.title: Chimp Sanctuary

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands
programme.desc: How the South Pacific islands has affected human culture.

programme.title: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: Learn how some of the most isolated islands became habited.

programme.title: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: Much of the South Pacific is a marine desert, but some areas support diverse life. Following how the ocean creatures survive the harsh conditions they live in.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Volcanoes

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Return of Dr. Strangeglove

programme.title: Jungle Animal Rescue: Operation: Elephant
programme.desc: This week, the team rescues and rehabilitates a captive elephant and a paralyzed monkey.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Curse of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The mangled mummy of a pharaoh is a 3,000-year-old cold case with brand-new leads; a team of experts in Egyptian archaeology and criminal forensics investigate fresh evidence to discover the truth behind this brutal death.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Curse of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The mangled mummy of a pharaoh is a 3,000-year-old cold case with brand-new leads; a team of experts in Egyptian archaeology and criminal forensics investigate fresh evidence to discover the truth behind this brutal death.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: NASA's Greatest Missions: The Secret History
Voyager: The Definitive History
programme.desc: Forty years ago, the Voyager spacecraft were launched to explore Jupiter, Saturn, Neptune, Uranus and the farthest reaches of our solar system. Go inside the untold stories of the extraordinary mission that changed our understanding of the cosmos.

programme.title: Above and Beyond: NASA's Journey to Tomorrow
programme.desc: As NASA celebrates its 60th anniversary, Discovery shines a spotlight on this historic institution and the vital role it has to play moving forward into the coming decades.

programme.title: Hubble: Thirty Years of Discovery
programme.desc: For thirty years, NASA's Hubble Space Telescope has discovered new alien worlds, black holes, and the age of the universe itself. NASA astronauts reveal the secret history of the life-or-death missions to keep this complex machine working.

programme.title: Hubble: Thirty Years of Discovery
programme.desc: For thirty years, NASA's Hubble Space Telescope has discovered new alien worlds, black holes, and the age of the universe itself. NASA astronauts reveal the secret history of the life-or-death missions to keep this complex machine working.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Blast from the Past
programme.desc: 38-year-old Michele Reiter's life seems to be on the up after a chaotic marriage and a troubled romance. But when Michele goes missing after accepting a date from a new Facebook friend, a horrific story unfolds.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Sick Boy
programme.desc: A young mother turns to the internet desperate for help and advice when her young son mysteriously falls ill.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Careful Who U Wish 4
programme.desc: A girl recovering from an abusive relationship looks for love on a popular dating site.

programme.title: American Monster: Too Good to be True
programme.desc: When attractive teacher Amanda Schmitt marries respected John Grazioli, home video captures their beautiful wedding. But just 6 months later, police respond to a 911 call and make a shocking discovery that unmasks the double life of a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Have You Seen This Woman?
programme.desc: Rebecca and Ken Pierce film themselves raising their four kids in idyllic rural Oklahoma. But the family is haunted by a specter of addiction and violence across generations that will leave two of them brutally murdered, and the family destroyed.

programme.title: Murder at Her Door
programme.desc: The murder of a former South Carolina homecoming queen stuns a community.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Evidence Never Lies
programme.desc: A young woman is found drowned in her bathtub and the evidence at the crime scene indicates her killer was someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: American Monster: Have You Seen This Woman?
programme.desc: Rebecca and Ken Pierce film themselves raising their four kids in idyllic rural Oklahoma. But the family is haunted by a specter of addiction and violence across generations that will leave two of them brutally murdered, and the family destroyed.

programme.title: Murder at Her Door
programme.desc: The murder of a former South Carolina homecoming queen stuns a community.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Buried Dreams
programme.desc: A mother's relentless investigation of her daughter's disappearance leads police to a terrifying string of murders.

programme.title: American Monster: Double Cross
programme.desc: Four best friends, two married couples, multiple sordid secrets, one huge betrayal and a murder. With exclusive interviews and never-before-aired home movie footage, this is a story about how a love affair resulted in a crime of passion.

programme.title: Home Alone: First Flame
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox is excited to start her senior year of high school after ending her abusive relationship with her boyfriend Adam. Unable to take the rejection, Adam breaks into her house with a bottle of gasoline and a lighter.

programme.title: Home Alone: A Mother and a Maniac
programme.desc: On the night of May 10, 2017, Haley McHam decides to leave her abusive partner Jamie. But when Jamie shows up the next day, nobody could have predicted the tragic home invasion that will leave Haley pleading for her life.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Jump Shot
programme.desc: Hollywood 'golden boy' Gavin Smith, a 20th Century Fox executive and former star UCLA basketball player goes missing. For years, his family and detectives search tirelessly for answers, but a group of heartless characters holds fast to their secrets.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Honeymoon Killers
programme.desc: A Belgian honeymoon comes to a tragic end when a freak car accident leads to a tragic death. The investigation takes police down a rabbit hole of violence and deceit, culminating in an international manhunt for a calculating killer.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Death in the Family
programme.desc: Randy Scheffield's family finds him dead in his bed, and their first thought is a heart attack. But detectives will slowly uncover a murder conspiracy that will rock this small town for years to come...

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son's Prisoner
programme.desc: Shelly Lietz had been afraid of her son ever since he was four years old. She knew she saw something evil in his eyes that scared her. As he got older and more violent, that fear crippled her, eventually making her a prisoner in her own home.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Soap Star's Secret
programme.desc: Thom Bierdz had finally made it big. When he brought his troubled younger brother out to Los Angeles, he thought he could help set him straight. He never expected that the price he would pay for being wrong would be the life of someone he loved.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother, The Devil
programme.desc: Wallace Jeffs was raised to believe that his half-brother, Warren, would guide his family to salvation.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster Inside Him
programme.desc: When Karen struck the deal that finally got her brother, Richard, out of her life, she didn't know he would turn his attention on another, his new wife, Vernetta. Neither woman realized the devastating impact Richard would have on both their lives.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Tragedy Comes in Pairs
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice in the desert town of Socorro, New Mexico, when Crystal Houston is found murdered just 14 months after her older sister, Stephanie, is killed in a suspicious accident.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Nightmare After Christmas
programme.desc: Rumors fly in the small town of Auburn, New Hampshire after well-known local George Jodoin is found murdered in his bed and the top three suspects are his close friends.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Stipps Hill Massacre
programme.desc: Most of the 500 or so folks who call Laurel, Indiana home are either kin or have known each other their whole lives. So when the Napier family is found massacred in their home, residents are terrified that a mass killer lurks somewhere in Laurel's fields.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Cost of Competition
programme.desc: When the home of the Resaca, Georgia 'Carpet King' is showered with gunfire and kills beloved daughter Tara Swilley, the self-made millionaire is convinced one of his business partners must be behind the killing.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Manson: The Prison Tapes
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate and LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his 'family' of misfit killers.

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched
programme.desc: On April 19, 1993, FBI agents attacked a religious compound in Waco, Texas, occupied by a small obscure religious cult. 76 people, including 26 children, died. The repercussions of Waco are still being felt.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched
programme.desc: On April 19, 1993, FBI agents attacked a religious compound in Waco, Texas, occupied by a small obscure religious cult. 76 people, including 26 children, died. The repercussions of Waco are still being felt.

programme.title: Manson: The Prison Tapes
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate and LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his 'family' of misfit killers.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Dallas Stoudemire: The Hero of El Paso
programme.desc: Lawlessness runs rampant in a notorious Texas outpost and it's up to legendary lawman Dallas Stoudenmire to tame the town known as 'Hell' Paso.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Modern Mansion Makeover
programme.desc: The builders give a modern mansion a complete log cabin makeover. They use log skins and a stacked log entryway. The pressure's on as the home will be the centerpiece of an entire log cabin community. Mark also tours a restored pioneer cabin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Team Barnwood
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders restore a cabin with major challenges.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fancy Cabin Takedown in Minor Hill
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work through layers of architectural history to uncover an original pioneer home. They hear stories from family members who lived in the cabin. Mark also visits a beautifully restored log home with its own extensive history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cowboy Party Barn in New Braunfels, TX
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to Texas to build a gigantic party barn out of an old timber frame. They use old-fashioned tools to retrofit the barn for modern use, and they install a rare swing beam in the center bent.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Summer Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Lauren and Dan own an amazing stone home in Montgomery County dating back to the 1850s which has a separate summer kitchen. The exterior is in great condition but the interior is crumbling.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1690s Living Room Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited by a couple to do a true restoration of the original living room in their 1690s stone home. They also want to enclose the attached vestibule to create a mudroom. They want it to blend in with the rest of the home with stone walls.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Uncovering a 1700s Home
programme.desc: After inheriting a 1700s stone home that's been in the family since 1906, a couple calls on Jeff to peel away the dated decor. They want to uncover as much of the original history as possible. Jeff and his team refinish the wood flooring and much more.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1751 Two-Floor Restoration
programme.desc: A mother and daughter bring Jeff in to restore two rooms in the original portion of their 1751 stone home. Jeff and his team give the dining room a slightly formal farmhouse feel. Then they achieve a rustic and refined style in the bathroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1802 Farmhouse Exterior
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin is called on to restore the exterior of an 1802 farmhouse. Jeff and his team uncover a historic stone path, re-create the original shutters and build a post and beam style front porch. They also add a rustic entertainment area.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1839 Lofty Master Suite
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin and his team are recruited to bring back some much-needed character to the master suite of an 1839 farmhouse.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Family Fun Deck With Plenty of Features
programme.desc: A 1970s-era sunroom and a small deck are taken down to create one space where a family can cook, eat, entertain, and stay warm. The finished project features a two-sided fireplace, water features, and custom privacy.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Mountain Retreat with a Rocky View
programme.desc: The team contends with nearly impassable roads, mountain weather and a build site on top a granite boulder.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ohio State Fair/ North Carolina Potato Festival
programme.desc: In Ohio, Noah tries the pulled pork donut and goes fishing in North Carolina for Calabash flounder.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Indiana State Fair/ Old Canal Days
programme.desc: At the Indiana State Fair, Noah Cappe devours a colossal grilled cheese sandwich and a fried elephant ear filled with fruit and Greek tomato balls. At Old Canal Days in Illinois, he samples loaded potato bites, Chicago-style pizza pie and a donut treat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Illinois State Fair/ Erie County Fair
programme.desc: Noah gets lucky in Illinois with the horseshoe sandwich, and gets Buffalo chicken pizza in New York.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: K-Days/ North Dakota State Fair
programme.desc: Noah begs for s'mores mini donuts in Edmonton and heads to North Dakota for wild rice burgers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.desc: Proving you can make any dish outside on a grill, Michael prepares a rich mac and cheese loaded with smoked ham with cream cheese, gouda and pecorino. He finishes off with a grilled apple crisp over their fire pit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat and Mandarins
programme.desc: Noah gets hot for the smokin' okra burger at the Eastern Carolina Agricultural Fair in Florence, SC. Then he launches into atomic habanero tots and 'The Big Yum' at the Mountain Mandarin Festival in Auburn, CA.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Royals and the Red River City
programme.desc: Noah begins his journey at the Royal Winter Fair in Toronto, Canada, where he says "yes, cheese" to the blue balsamic. Later, he ends his culinary adventure at the State Fair of Louisiana with the sweet Not Yo' Average Nachos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Old Tricks

programme.title: NCIS: Homesick

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Dependent

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Florida

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pretend

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Screwed

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: The Taunting

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi

programme.desc: The buyers return to Montebello, Calif., where Dave Hester finds some marketing Americana and Barry buys a sweet unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Time to Kiln
programme.desc: The buyers head out to rainy San Jacinto, California, where Darrell discovers something that is music to his ears. Brandi and Jarrod find they need to team up with Barry if they want to make any money. Nabila tries to expand her territory.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mary's Big Score
programme.desc: Lockers in El Monte, CA have been known to hold some great finds and this auction is no different.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Santa Ana Surprise
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi attend an auction in Santa Ana, but their plans go awry when Dave shows up looking to cause trouble. Meanwhile, Mary is hoping her luck will turn around, and Rene needs help with a massive score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: You Win Some, You Luge Some
programme.desc: Indio is extremely interesting for Dave. Brandi and Jarrod find the ultimate stash while Mary's locker misfires.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Middle-Aged Mutant Ninja Buyers
programme.desc: The buyers head to an auction in Westminster, where the units sell for thousands. Jarrod and Brandi are hoping for quick and easy, but the high prices are no bargain. Ivy goes on a buying spree.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mexican Grand Off
programme.desc: As Jarrod and Brandi fight the competition, Mary Padian struggles to stay afloat. Darrell and Brandon Sheets face off against Dave Hester in their quest to find profitable units. Also, Ivy Calvin searches the auctions to stock his thrift store.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mr. Nezhoda's Opus
programme.desc: Dan and Laura take the buyers back to Torrance for an auction that has them battling for the best unit of the day. Ivy changes up his game to stunning results, Brandi puts Jarrod on a harsh budget and Dave takes on Rene against every locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: It's All Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Ivy has no problem spending his bucks for the right locker. Darrell and Brandon have got a hunger they need to feed.

programme.title: Storage Wars: What Cowboy Dreams May Come
programme.desc: Santa Ana is Dave Hester's old stomping grounds, and he plays it to his diabolical advantage as he makes the other buyers struggle to get a decent locker. Jarrod and Brandi can't seem to get on their game, while Rene has to hit hard to get a unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: High Scores in Arcadia
programme.desc: The upper class area of Arcadia, CA promises solid auctions for the buyers.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Deep in the Heart of Upland
programme.desc: The buyers have a surprise visitor from the Lone Star state at an auction in Upland, CA. Jarrod and Brandi are determined to make big money from small finds.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fontan-o-rama
programme.desc: Fontana, CA becomes FUNtana as Dave explores his lighter side and Mary tries to put a little 'Texas' into the auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler of Thrones
programme.desc: The buyers head out to Palm Springs for an auction that brings sweet lockers and big money finds. Mary is worried that they area may be too high society for her, while Ivy sets his sights on vintage items.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buys and Dolls
programme.desc: The buyers hit Torrance for tough competition over only a few quality lockers. Brandi is forced to face her fears when Jarrod gets a locker sure to give her nightmares.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bid Strong and Prosper
programme.desc: Dan Dotson returns to the auctions in Costa Mesa, where the buyers have their sights set on Dave Hester's home turf. Darrell and Brandon take the auction over the top. Jarrod and Brandi make a discovery that takes them where no bidder has gone before.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Along the Swatchtower
programme.desc: The buyers throw down in Koreatown. Dave expects to score some high-end merchandise, while Darrell struggles as he's never been to this area before. Mary fights for her lockers, and Jarrod may just push Brandi over the edge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Movie: Blended

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Dance Moves and Dirty Laundry

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Push the Pain Away

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Life Is Fluid

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Natural Born Storyteller

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Never Know Who's Who

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forget My Name

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now I'm God

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: A gunslinger locked in eternal battle with a sorcerer over the fate of all worlds has his mission interrupted when he meets a boy from Earth. Their conflict spills onto the streets of New York City where the two men clash in a battle of good versus evil.

programme.title: Movie: War for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: When all out war breaks out between human and ape civilizations, the ape leader struggles to deal with his darkest instincts. With a brutal Colonel leading the human forces, fate draws them together to a fight that will determine the future of the world.

programme.title: Movie: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A young man with extraordinary powers must confront his alien heritage when outcast members of his race invade Earth to claim it as their new home.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Making of Blue Planet II
programme.desc: The stories behind Planet Earth: Blue Planet II's most memorable moments. Discover what went into creating this stunning series, as the crews reveal the lengths they went to and the ground-breaking filming technology.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: World's Biggest Tiger Shark?
programme.desc: Marine biologist Kori Garza and cinematographer Andy Casagrande track a huge tiger shark.
